sql_array: CREATE TABLE kv_test (data String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO kv_test VALUES ('name:neymar, age:31, team:psg, nationality:brazil');
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(data, ':', ',', '') AS kv FROM kv_test WHERE data LIKE '%team:%';
UPDATE kv_test SET data = extractKeyValuePairs(data, ':', ',', '') WHERE data LIKE '%age:%';
